ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing Set In Scd 218 On Oct.15,2002 At 9:00 Am
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Ernest Krause, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. The petitioner was sworn and examined. Default is entered against Carlos Loucel. Counsel stated to the court that a dismissal without prejudice was filed this morning against Defendant Liliana Bermudez. The Court hears evidence and good cause appearing grants judgment as follows: Principal: $57,718.41; Costs: $513.00 and pre-judgment interest to be determined. Counsel for plaintiff to prepare order for the Court's signature.
